meaning: v.重整旗鼓,给予新力量,(使)恢复健康,力量,决心,集结n.集会
examples: After a brief rally the shares returned to $2.15.
Speakers at the rally expressed sentiments of unity.
The rally was intended to be a show of strength by the socialists.
Monletsgolia are one of 340 teams taking part in the deliberately eccentric Mongol Rally.
At a campaign rally in Virginia, Mr Romney did not respond directly to the president's criticism.
